name: Ceramic Speckled Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) White - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: A great combination of functionality and modern style, this Ceramic Speckled Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee makes an elegant addition to your home. This table lamp stands on a ceramic base designed in a pot-like shape with elegant curves and speckled hues, and it comes complete with a drum-shape shade for an unique, attractive look. Suitable for a variety of spaces, this ceramic table lamp features a dimmable light setting to help you adjust the light according to your need with the pole rotary dimmer switch.
